---
title: "Edit Parish Database"
author: "Alan Jackson"
format: html
editor: source
---

##    interactive edit

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(DataEditR)

google_CRS <- "EPSG:4326"

path <- "/home/ajackson/Dropbox/Rprojects/TexasDioceseCreationCare/Data/"

My_dataframe <- readRDS(paste0(path, "Clean_Parishes.rds")) %>% 
  mutate(lon=sf::st_coordinates(.)[, "X"]) %>% 
  mutate(lat=sf::st_coordinates(.)[, "Y"]) %>% 
  st_drop_geometry()

New_dataframe <- data_edit(My_dataframe)
# data_edit(My_dataframe, viewer = "browser")

```

##    If you're happy save your file

```{r}

New_dataframe <- New_dataframe %>% 
    sf::st_as_sf(coords=c("lon", "lat"), crs=google_CRS)  

saveRDS(New_dataframe, paste0(path, "Clean_Parishes.rds"))

```
